Class BloomFilter.SubFilter

java.lang.Object
org.infinispan.server.resp.commands.bloom.BloomFilter.SubFilter
Enclosing class:
BloomFilter
@ProtoTypeId(6137) public static final class BloomFilter.SubFilter extends Object
A sub-filter in a scalable Bloom filter.
Since:
16.2
